title: [kimi-review] 58345e8: [SEVERITY: medium] Commit claims a security-relevant fix (pu
description:
Commit: 58345e865
Message: fix(edhoc): validate peer pubkey before ed25519_verify

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] Commit claims a security-relevant fix (pubkey validation before signature verification) but contains no code. Either the change is missing from what was submitted for review, or the commit is empty — in which case the fix is not actually applied and the underlying vulnerability (calling `ed25519_verify` on an unvalidated/malformed point, e.g., small-order or non-canonical keys) may still be present.
